name: Property Dispute Test
story: My grandfather owned agricultural land in Village Kharod, District Vadodara, Survey No. 45/2. After his death in 2010, the property was supposed to be divided equally among his 3 sons including my father. However, my uncle (father's elder brother) has been in exclusive possession of the entire land since 2010 and has not given our share. He mutated the land records in his name only in 2015 without our consent. We have the original sale deed from 1985 in grandfather's name, old revenue records (khasra/khatauni) showing joint ownership, and property tax receipts paid by my father until 2010. My uncle is now trying to sell the land to a third party. We need urgent legal intervention to stop the sale and get our rightful share. There is no ongoing court case yet.
oppositeParty: Uncle - Ramesh Patel, +91-9876543210, Village Kharod, Vadodara
